'''pawodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabeljauw|kabeljauw]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-w-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabeljauw|kabeljauw]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pawodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæwedheth|pæwedheth]] || [[word:pæwedhej|pæwedhej]] || [[word:pæwedhesh|pæwedhesh]] || [[word:pæwedhe|pæwedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pawowodhoth|pawowodhoth]] || [[word:pawowodhoj|pawowodhoj]] || [[word:pawowodhosh|pawowodhosh]] || [[word:pawowodho|pawowodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pawodhoth|pawodhoth]] || [[word:pawodhoj|pawodhoj]] || [[word:pawodhosh|pawodhosh]] || [[word:pawodho|pawodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pawofdhoth|pawofdhoth]] || [[word:pawofdhoj|pawofdhoj]] || [[word:pawofdhosh|pawofdhosh]] || [[word:pawofdhof|pawofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pawodhotho|pawodhotho]] || [[word:pawodhojo|pawodhojo]] || [[word:pawodhosho|pawodhosho]] || [[word:pawodhoko|pawodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pawodhoth|pawodhoth]] || [[word:pawodhoj|pawodhoj]] || [[word:pawodhosh|pawodhosh]] || [[word:pawodho|pawodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pawodhothol|pawodhothol]] || [[word:pawodhojol|pawodhojol]] || [[word:pawodhoshol|pawodhoshol]] || [[word:pawodhokol|pawodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pawodhothotho|pawodhothotho]] || [[word:pawodhojojo|pawodhojojo]] || [[word:pawodhoshosho|pawodhoshosho]] || [[word:pawodhoko|pawodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pawodhothon|pawodhothon]] || [[word:pawodhojon|pawodhojon]] || [[word:pawodhoshon|pawodhoshon]] || [[word:pawodhokon|pawodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pawodhothoro|pawodhothoro]] || [[word:pawodhojoro|pawodhojoro]] || [[word:pawodhoshoro|pawodhoshoro]] || [[word:pawodhokoro|pawodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
